description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a global before_script of apk update, apk add make, and make ci-web-prelude and runs on the node:12.7.0-alpine Docker image for most jobs. Define two stages, build and test, and add a build-names-db job in the build stage that overrides the image to rust:1-stretch, runs an additional before_script make names-db-prelude, then executes make names-db-build-unoptimized. Add a build-web job in the build stage that runs make web-build using the global node image. In the test stage add core-js-lint running make core-javascript-lint, core-js-test running make core-javascript-test, and web-lint running make web-lint, all using the node image. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
